title: sturmia nervosa
intro: Sturmia nervosa, also known as St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sturmia nervosa include reducing symptoms of mild to moderate depression, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as improving sleep quality and mood. Sturmia nervosa can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, capsules, and topical creams, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
